description: Customer schema. This schema is intended to represent customers in a general way, and can be referenced by other schemas such as CommitteeMember or ProjectContact.
title: Cannonical Schema for general person information
$comment: Last modified on 2026-04-08 by Hans Bot - NEN. To be referenced from identified entities, such as contact person, employee, committee member, etc.

initials.description: The initials of the person, if applicable.

lastName.description: The last name or surname of the person.

firstName.description: The first name of the person.

middleName.description: The middle name of the person.

givenName.description: The given name of the person.

gender.description: M = Male, F = Female, X = Other, N = Unknown

salutation.description: Salutation, optional, used for gender identification such as Ms, Mr.

academicTitle.description: Title of person, used for academic, corporations or military titles, etc. Dr. Eng., MD, BSc, etc.

emails.description: A list of email addresses associated with the person.

phoneNumbers.description: A list of telephone numbers associated with the person.

preferedLanguage.description: Language of preference for communication purposes
